summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Planlægning (Planning) tab functionality. All required features are working correctly including dropdown selections, FRI option with green background, mailto functionality, and email editing in Chauffører tab.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact, just status code inconsistency

passed_tests: Admin panel has 4 tabs: Planlægning, Chauffører, Genbrugsplads, Historik
Planlægning tab displays daily scheduling interface correctly
Each driver has dropdown selector for plads assignment
Dropdown includes FRI option with beach emoji (🏖️ FRI (Fridag))
FRI selection applies green background to driver row
Green background is removed when non-FRI option is selected
Dropdown contains all available plads (Glostrup, Herlev, Ballerup, etc.)
'Send til alle' button is present and enabled
Individual 'Send Mail' buttons present for each driver
Summary counters show work assignments (Arbejder, FRI, Ikke tildelt)
Chauffører tab has Email column with proper display
Email editing functionality works with input fields in edit mode
Edit buttons (blue pencil icons) activate email editing mode
Save/cancel buttons appear in edit mode
Add driver form includes Email field
Drivers without emails show 'Ingen email' in red text
Drivers with emails show email addresses in blue text
Backend APIs working correctly: drivers, plads, seed data
Admin login with credentials admin/ilkaps works correctly
